currentFormatDecision: Renderer-backed JSON goldens use compact run-length pixel storage once they exceed the ungoverned size limit. Legacy pretty-printed pixel-array goldens remain loadable, but new harness writes use urpg.visual_golden.rle.v1.
lfsPolicy: Current compact visual baselines stay JSON for reviewability. Future binary visual baselines must use the existing Git LFS binary rules.

reviewRequirements.oversizedGolden: Every committed *.golden.json above maxUngovernedGoldenBytes must be listed here with a reason, review strategy, and human-review artifact or summary.
reviewRequirements.formatMigration: Compact baseline storage must preserve executable comparison and actionable diff diagnostics.
